title: stachys distans var. distans
intro: Stachys distans var. distans, also known as Dyer's wort or Persian betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stachys distans var. distans include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
